description_long: This object is a rectangular, flat electronic device with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, accented by dark red buttons. The top surface features a large cross-shaped directional pad on one side and two smaller square buttons on the opposite side, with a set of parallel black lines in the center, suggesting a classic control interface. The device is reminiscent of vintage handheld game controllers, with a simple, utilitarian design and no visible display screen. The casing appears to be made of hard plastic, with a matte finish and slightly beveled edges. The buttons are raised and likely made of a denser plastic, providing tactile feedback for user interaction. This object would typically be found in urban environments as a portable electronic accessory, possibly for gaming or remote control purposes.
description: A rectangular, gray and black electronic device with dark red buttons, resembling a vintage handheld game controller. It features a large cross-shaped pad and two square buttons on a flat, matte surface.
description_view_0: The device is viewed from the end with the two square buttons most prominent, showing the cross-shaped pad in the background.
description_view_1: This view shows the device from the side with the cross-shaped pad on the right and the two square buttons on the left, displaying the full control layout.
description_view_2: The device is seen from the end with the cross-shaped pad most prominent, with the two square buttons in the background.
description_view_3: This view shows the device from the side with the cross-shaped pad on the left and the two square buttons on the right, mirroring view 1.
